title: Fervente´s Admin Notification
description: A  server administration tool that lets admins send notifications to players with ease.
body:
### Fervente's Admin Notifications


**A sleek and intuitive server administration tool for Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge that lets admins send stylish, color-coded notifications to players with ease.**


## [- View Curseforge Page -](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fervente-s-admin-notification)

![ https://shockbyte.com/billing/aff.php?aff=10999](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fad8ed912cd64e1610fd7eebe4e15ee02aa5976e.png)
[Click Here](https://shockbyte.com/billing/aff.php?aff=10999)


- 📢 Overview


Tired of spamming chat with plain messages that get lost in the noise? **Fervente's Admin Notifications** is designed specifically for roleplay servers and server administration, providing a clean and professional way to communicate with players through bold, attention-grabbing notifications with custom sounds and action bar alerts.


Perfect for:
- **Roleplay Servers** – Send in-character announcements or warnings
- **Server Administration** – Guide new players or warn rule-breakers
- **Event Management** – Notify players about server events
- **Moderation** – Quick, professional communication with players


---


* ✨ Features


* 🎨 Two Notification Types


**Tell Notifications** (Neutral/Positive)
- Bold yellow text with dash prefix: **– Your message here**
- Pleasant bell sound
- Ideal for: Welcomes, tips, guidance, announcements


**Warn Notifications** (Warnings/Alerts)
- Bold red text with dash prefix: **– Your warning here**
- Classic "wrong" note block sound (low harp note)
- Ideal for: Rule warnings, area restrictions, important alerts

* 🔔 Visual & Audio Feedback
- **Bold colored messages** stand out in chat
- **Stylish action bar** with yellow **[!]** icon and white text
- **Appropriate sounds** for each notification type (not ear-piercing!)
- **Dash prefix (–)** makes notifications instantly recognizable


* 💾 Preset System
Save frequently used messages as presets for instant reuse:
- Create tell or warn presets
- Use them on any player or selector
- Delete presets when no longer needed
- Automatically saved to config file


---


## 🎮 Commands


All commands require **OP level 2+** (gamemaster permissions).


### Sending Notifications


```
/notify tell <targets> [send] <message>
```
Send a positive/neutral notification in bold yellow with a bell sound.


**Examples:**
- `/notify tell @a Welcome to our server!`
- `/notify tell PlayerName send Remember to read the rules!`


---


```
/notify warn <targets> [send] <message>
```
Send a warning notification in bold red with a low note block sound.


**Examples:**
- `/notify warn @a This area is restricted!`
- `/notify warn PlayerName send Please stop breaking blocks here.`


---


```
/notify preset <preset_name> [send] <targets>
```
Send a saved preset to specific players.


**Examples:**
- `/notify preset welcome_msg @p`
- `/notify preset spawn_warning send @a[r=50]`


---


### Managing Presets


```
/prenotify set tell <message> <preset_name>
```
Create a new tell-type preset.


**Example:**
- `/prenotify set tell Welcome to our roleplay server! Please check the rules. welcome_msg`


---


```
/prenotify set warn <message> <preset_name>
```
Create a new warn-type preset.


**Example:**
- `/prenotify set warn This area is off-limits! Return to spawn immediately. restricted_area`


---


```
/prenotify remove <preset_name>
```
Delete an existing preset.


**Example:**
- `/prenotify remove old_event_msg`


---


## 🎯 Target Selectors


Use standard Minecraft selectors for flexible targeting:
- `@a` – All players
- `@p` – Nearest player
- `@s` – Command executor
- `@a[distance=..50]` – All players within 50 blocks
- `PlayerName` – Specific player by username


---


## 📋 What Players See


When you send a notification, players experience:


1. **Chat Message**: Bold colored text with dash prefix
   - Tell: **– Your message** (yellow)
   - Warn: **– Your warning** (red)


2. **Action Bar**: Appears above hotbar
   - **[!] Notification received** (yellow icon, white text)


3. **Sound Effect**:
   - Tell: Pleasant bell chime
   - Warn: Low "wrong" note block sound


---


## ⚙️ Configuration


Presets are automatically saved to:
```
config/ferventes_admin_notifications.json
```


No manual configuration needed! The file is created and updated automatically when you create or remove presets. You can also manually edit this file if needed, but it's recommended to use commands for preset management.


---


## 🔧 Installation


1. Download the mod JAR file
2. Place it in your server's `mods/` folder
3. Restart your server
4. Grant admin permissions (OP level 3) to trusted players
5. Start using `/notify` and `/prenotify` commands!


**Requirements:**
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.3.0 or higher
- Java 17 or higher



---


🆘 FAQ


**Q: Can players use these commands?**  
A: No, only players with OP level 2+ (gamemaster permissions) can use these commands.


**Q: Is this client-side or server-side?**  
A: Server-side only. Players don't need to install anything.


**Q: Can I customize the colors or sounds?**  
A: Currently, tell uses yellow/bell and warn uses red/harp. Customization may come in future updates!


**Q: What happens if I use an invalid preset name?**  
A: You'll receive an error message: "Preset 'name' not found"


**Q: Can preset names have spaces?**  
A: No, preset names must be single words (e.g., `welcome_msg`, `spawn_warn`). Use underscores for multi-word names.


**Q: Is the 'send' keyword required?**  
A: No! It's completely optional and only there for readability. Both work:
- `/notify tell @a Welcome!`
- `/notify tell @a send Welcome!`


**Q: Where are presets stored?**  
A: In `config/ferventes_admin_notifications.json` in your server folder.


**Q: Can I backup my presets?**  
A: Yes! Just copy the `ferventes_admin_notifications.json` file from your config folder.
